subject: Fwd: MY & SG CB Monthly Update 20241015

content.question: Do not quite understand how to read these slides. Maybe can go through later. I need to understand the following
What is the % of MY local ADO do we have published in SG right now
What is the max % of MY local ADO we can reach, and the various reasons on how we are unable to reach 100%
And timeline to reach the max %..
I find it hard to understand this table.
Can start with USD 10 as listing price for MY product and what current listing price in SG would look like and what listing price in SG would look like in new proposal?
And I would like to understand the markup % of each component to understand how to reach listing price in SG. And how the markup % will change in both your proposal..
Why do we want to do this? To drive ADO growth at the sacrifice of P&L?
Feels like we need to better understand what is affecting the price competitiveness of MYSIP SKUs?
